message:
🐛 Fix responsive button overflow at lg breakpoint (#10001) (#10040)

Move extended desktop navbar items (UpdateIndicator, AI Missions,
StreakBadge, TokenUsageWidget, FeatureRequestButton) from lg (1024px)
to xl (1280px) breakpoint. At 1024px the combined width of all visible
navbar items exceeded viewport width, causing BUTTON elements to
overflow — caught by Playwright cross-browser nightly.

The overflow (More) menu visibility is also raised from lg:hidden to
xl:hidden so these items remain accessible via the menu at 1024-1279px.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
